user_request: Create several JSON files in a single zipped folder from two JSON files, splitting information by categories of how disabilities affect the brain and body as well as social, professional, and personal limitations caused by disorders.

source_files.role: Original source JSON preserved so the categorized split files do not remove source information.
Original source JSON preserved so the categorized split files do not remove source information.

category_files.description: Master index of all condition/domain/device/disorder entries and category crosswalks.
How disabilities and disorders affect the brain, nervous system, cognition, attention, memory, perception, communication, and executive functioning
How disabilities and disorders affect the body, physical systems, pain, fatigue, immune/endocrine function, mobility, digestion, breathing, skin, blood pressure, and medical stability
Psychological and emotional impacts: fear, shame, grief, anxiety, identity, self-worth, mood, trauma, regulation, and distress
Social, relationship, family, community, dating, friendship, and participation limitations caused by symptoms and inaccessible environments
Professional, educational, school, work, employment, legal, financial, scheduling, and productivity limitations
Personal daily living, self-care, independence, routines, household, boundaries, planning, and quality-of-life limitations
Mobility, transportation, housing, wheelchair, power-chair, cab, ambulance, emergency transport, and built-environment barriers
Needed accommodations and the effects when accommodations are absent, denied, inconsistent, or treated as afterthoughts
Emergency, safety, legal, crisis, self-harm, injury, accident, anaphylaxis, ambulance, and risk impacts
Map showing where original raw extracted text and complete original JSONs are preserved.

medical_and_legal_note: The JSON files are informational and accessibility-focused. They are not medical advice, diagnosis, legal advice, or an emergency plan.
